  0056CACC  00 00 00 00 42 00 6C 00 75 00 65 00 20 00 54 00   ....B.l.u.e. .T.
  0056CADC  65 00 61 00 6D 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00   e.a.m...........
  0056CAEC  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00   ................
  0056CAFC  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00   ................
  0056CB0C  00 00 00 00 32 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00   ....2...........
  0056CB1C  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00   ................
  0056CB2C  00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 31 00 73 00 74 00 00 00   ........1.s.t...
  0056CB3C  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00   ................
  0056CB4C  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 52 00 65 00 64 00 20 00   ........R.e.d. .
  0056CB5C  54 00 65 00                                       T.e.

=== Team 0 (0x0055DC30, 0x84 bytes) ===
  0055DC30  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00   ................
